title: Can I change an Item's Format When Moving to Another Group
excerpt:
Hi! 
If I have a group that uses an item format as “last name, first name,” is there a way to automate moving the item and changing the format so that it duplicates the item as “first name last name” in the new board/gro…

posts.author: jpalarca (Justin Palarca)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi!

If I have a group that uses an item format as “last name, first name,” is there a way to automate moving the item and changing the format so that it duplicates the item as “first name last name” in the new board/group location?

Thanks!

posts.author: mark.anley (Green Llamas Consulting)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @jpalarca - only if First Name and Last Name are stored in separate columns. You cannot transpose the Name column without 3rd party app support or make.com.

Thanks!
Mark
